title: But what exactly are world models?
summary: Julia Turc presents an overview of world models, contrasting generative and predictive approaches, and describes three main categories of applications: synthetic data generation, interactive environments, and autonomous agents. The video features examples from NVIDIA Cosmos, Meta V-JEPA, Wayve GAIA, Google Genie, World Labs Marble, and Waymo.
